Quiz PORTAL
CAMPUS INTELLIQUIZ
2026
SIGN IN
CREATE ACCOUNT

Register to join the competition. Admin will approve your role.

📷

ACCESS REQUIRED

Proctoring failed. Camera and Microphone access are mandatory to participate in this competition. Please grant permission from your browser's system prompt.

ACCESS DENIED
HOW TO FIX:
1. Click the Camera/Lock icon in your address bar.
2. Change "Blocked" to "Allowed".
3. Use HTTPS for remote/mobile access.

🔌 MOBILE / SAME WI-FI FIX:
If using a local IP (e.g., 192.168.1.X) on your phone:
1. Open Chrome on Phone.
2. Go to: chrome://flags
3. Search for: Insecure origins treated as secure
4. Add your Server IP (e.g., http://192.168.1.5:8080) and set to Enabled.
5. Relaunch Chrome. This allows Camera/Mic to work over Wi-Fi.
🔒 Your privacy matters. Feed is active only during the live competition.
